raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, I am submitting this complaint regarding Citis handling of a billing dispute on my credit card account. 

I authorized a transaction in the amount of {$39.00} only. However, the merchant charged my card an additional {$340.00}, which I did not authorize. When Citi sent a fraud alert text asking if I recognized the {$340.00} charge, I immediately replied NO and provided an explanation. 

Despite my prompt response and multiple phone calls to Citi during which I experienced long wait times and several disconnections my dispute was denied. I was instructed to contact the merchant directly, but I have been unable to reach them, and I am concerned this may be a scam. 

This situation has caused me significant stress and anxiety, as I feel my billing rights have not been properly protected. Under the Fair Credit Billing Act, I am requesting that Citi conduct a thorough reinvestigation of this unauthorized charge and provide documentation explaining why the transaction was determined to be valid. 

I am seeking the removal of the {$340.00} charge and a fair review of my case. 

Thank you for your assistance in this matter. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
